#
# SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause
#

find_package(Doxygen REQUIRED)

set(DOXYGEN_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR})

if(NOT DEFINED DOXYGEN_GENERATE_HTML)
  set(DOXYGEN_GENERATE_HTML YES)
endif()
set(DOXYGEN_HTML_OUTPUT html)

if(NOT DEFINED DOXYGEN_GENERATE_LATEX)
  set(DOXYGEN_GENERATE_LATEX NO)
endif()
set(DOXYGEN_LATEX_OUTPUT latex)

if(NOT DEFINED DOXYGEN_GENERATE_MAN)
  set(DOXYGEN_GENERATE_MAN YES)
endif()
set(DOXYGEN_MAN_OUTPUT man)

# Make the CMake-generated Doxyfile as close to the Autotools-generated one as
# possible:
set(DOXYGEN_ABBREVIATE_BRIEF "")
set(DOXYGEN_OPTIMIZE_OUTPUT_FOR_C YES)
set(DOXYGEN_INLINE_GROUPED_CLASSES YES)
set(DOXYGEN_INLINE_SIMPLE_STRUCTS YES)
set(DOXYGEN_EXTRACT_LOCAL_CLASSES NO)
set(DOXYGEN_CASE_SENSE_NAMES NO)
set(DOXYGEN_SHOW_USED_FILES NO)
set(DOXYGEN_SHOW_FILES NO)
set(DOXYGEN_RECURSIVE NO)
set(DOXYGEN_EXAMPLE_PATH ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/examples)
set(DOXYGEN_HTML_EXTRA_STYLESHEET ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/libmtime.css)
set(DOXYGEN_HTML_TIMESTAMP YES)
set(DOXYGEN_COMPACT_LATEX YES)
set(DOXYGEN_LATEX_HEADER ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/libmtime.tex)
set(DOXYGEN_LATEX_HIDE_INDICES YES)
set(DOXYGEN_EXPAND_ONLY_PREDEF YES)
set(DOXYGEN_PREDEFINED DOXYGEN_DOCUMENTATION_ONLY)

doxygen_add_docs(
  doc
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/include
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/src
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/doc
  ALL
  COMMENT "Building documentation"
)

if(DOXYGEN_GENERATE_HTML)
  install(
    DIRECTORY ${DOXYGEN_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY}/${DOXYGEN_HTML_OUTPUT}/ TYPE DOC
  )
endif()

if(DOXYGEN_GENERATE_MAN)
  install(DIRECTORY ${DOXYGEN_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY}/${DOXYGEN_MAN_OUTPUT}/ TYPE MAN)
endif()
